name: Checkout Review
notes: Auth: [Authorize] on CheckoutModel — unauthenticated requests are redirected to the login page by ASP.NET Core middleware before the handler runs.
Shipping address is hardcoded in OnPost as new Address("123 Main St.", "Kent", "OH", "United States", "44240") — there is no address-entry UI; the Spring Boot rebuild must introduce one.

OnPost executes three sequential mutations in a try block: SetQuantities → CreateOrderAsync → DeleteBasketAsync; any EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException thrown by CreateOrderAsync causes a redirect to /basket without creating the order.
CatalogItem prices are NOT re-read during checkout — order line item prices come from BasketItem.UnitPrice (the price at the time the item was added to the basket).
